captureMethod: browser MCP (Claude Preview) against the live app (npm run dev) with live Open-Meteo data, per docs/qa/demo-script.md (ADR-0001 / TC-STACK-05: no Playwright in MVP). States visually reviewed and recorded in docs/qa/g5-browser-smoke.md.

clips.shows: Top bar (logo, clock slot, theme indicator), responsive 1/2/3-col layout, first-load hero + centered search.
Live header clock updating each minute in the visitor's local time.

clips.proves: FR-SEARCH-01, FR-SEARCH-02, FR-SEARCH-03, FR-SEARCH-04, FR-SEARCH-05, FR-SEARCH-06
clips.shows: Debounced suggestions (name/region/country/flag), select → ?lat&lon&name, Enter-on-single, 'Nothing found' inline, 'Use my location' button.
Deterministic Ukrainian footer joke; Open-Meteo + OpenStreetMap credit links.
7 day cards (UA weekday, hi/lo, icon, precip %, wind), 48h Recharts hourly chart, today's sunrise/sunset, re-fetch on location change.
OSM Leaflet map at city zoom, marker + popup, click sets location (coordinate label) + re-fetch, attribution bottom-right, client-only skeleton.
Per-day colored comfort badge (green/yellow/red) with Ukrainian accessible name, highlighted weekend average.
Condition-driven day/night gradient + particles by location sun times; prefers-reduced-motion static; pointer-events pass-through.
Pin up to 3 cities (chip row + limit), Compare-weekend table (Sat/Sun hi/lo, precip %, comfort), sticky header + make-active.
Offline/failed forecast → calm inline error + retry (never a 500/blank/toast); console stays silent.
